name: Wildrise
short_description: Inspired by Alchemy Deluxe, WildRise is a peaceful tile-matching journey where you help forest guardian Floofi restore nature. Create beautiful landscapes, bring wildlife back to life, and watch the world bloom.
detailed_description:
Take a deep breath and help the world grow green again.

In WildRise, you're a forest guardian on a gentle mission to restore a world lost to concrete. Place colorful tiles of mushrooms, flowers, and wildlife to crack through the gray and reveal vibrant nature underneath. Watch birds return to trees, butterflies dance through meadows, and ancient magic awaken.

Key Features:

  • Peaceful puzzle-solving — Familiar tile-matching mechanics in a tranquil setting

  • Beautiful transformations — Watch lifeless concrete become thriving ecosystems

  • Charming companion — Floofi the forest guardian accompanies your journey

  • Varied biomes — Restore forests, rivers, wetlands, volcanoes, and ancient ruins

  • Wildlife returns — See the world come alive with birds, butterflies, and more

  • Perfect pacing — Take your time and enjoy the restoration process

No time pressure. No penalties. Just you, nature, and the satisfying feeling of making the world beautiful again.

For players who love: Dorfromantik, A Little to the Left, Unpacking, cozy puzzle games with wholesome themes
